user.title: Neocontrol Gateway Setup
user.description: Enter the MAC address of your Inteo Station V2 gateway.

add_another.description: Successfully added {count} shutters. Do you want to add another one?

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format (must be 12 hex characters)
error.no_shutters: You must add at least one shutter before clicking Done.

abort.already_configured: The gateway {mac} is already configured. To add or remove shutters, please click on 'CONFIGURE' on the existing Neocontrol integration card.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Successfully updated the existing gateway with your new shutters! No duplicate entries were created.
